userDefinedField.fieldValue: MW id 19 Flows schedule can not be customized in Markitwire - period 0 / leg 1
MW id 21 Xccy swap with reset on leg 1 are not MW compatible
MW id 22 Both legs should be using the EOM or IMM Schedule generator to be MW compliant
Pay EUR EURIBOR 6M on floating leg 1,000,000 Receive GBP LIBOR 6M on floating leg 673,935 Expiry 27 aug 2017
Cross Currency Resettable Interest Rate Swap
Dodd Frank Restricted. ISDA1 non-compliant.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
